name: clarity-ai-extension
description: Clarity.AI is an open-source browser extension for in-place, context-aware explanations with direct Gemini or an optional self-hosted backend.

scripts.check: node --check src/extension/background.js && node --check src/extension/content.js && node --check src/extension/options.js && node --check src/extension/result.js && node --check src/backend/server.js && node --check src/backend/api/health.js && node --check src/backend/api/explain.js
